commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Telegram forced-document sends route video media through sendDocument, skips video-specific probing/routing in that mode, and updates related tests, docs, CLI help, and tool descriptions.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main ignores forceDocument after kind === "video" and routes MP4 media to sendVideo before the document fallback. I did not run a live Telegram send in this read-only review.
